failedAssertions.reason: Error UI not displayed when API is unreachable. hasErrorUI() returns false because stores don't show error toasts when API calls fail.
Error UI not displayed for 500 errors on session create, profile load, and chat API. Stores don't trigger error toasts for these scenarios.
Timeout error UI not displayed. Timeout requests don't trigger error toasts in stores.

systemicIssues.description: Stores don't show error toasts when API calls fail (500, network error, timeout). profileStore.loadProfile fails silently, sessionStore.beginSession sets error but MeditationChat doesn't display it, chat API errors don't show toast.
systemicIssues.impact: VAL-ERROR-001, VAL-ERROR-002, VAL-ERROR-003 - 7 specific test scenarios fail because error UI is not displayed when store API calls fail
systemicIssues.rootCause: The hasErrorUI() helper checks for .toast--error, .error-boundary, .meditation-chat__error[role=alert], .session-history__error[role=alert], [role=alert]. These elements are not rendered because stores don't call toast.showError() when API calls fail

reRunNotes: Re-run after round 2. The 3 failed assertions (VAL-ERROR-001, VAL-ERROR-002, VAL-ERROR-003) still fail - the fix feature 'add-error-toasts-to-stores' has not yet been implemented (status: pending). Same 7 test scenarios fail with same root cause: stores don't show error toasts when API calls fail.
